title: BFT Clock Configuration

max_drift_step.description: Maximum per-sync drift adjustment in seconds.

max_total_drift.description: Maximum absolute drift correction in seconds (|current_drift_|).

max_cluster_skew.description: Maximum allowed spread of clustered timestamps in seconds.

min_quorum.description: Minimum number of valid observations required for BFT sync.

fail_closed.description: If true, abort process when drift ceiling is exceeded.
